title: Stir-Fried Rhubarb with Filipino Flair
description: A sweet and savory stir-fry combining the tanginess of rhubarb with the bold flavors of the Philippines.

ingredients.name: Fresh ginger
ingredients.notes: Add a spicy kick to your dish

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Add a pinch to balance flavors

ingredients.name: Fresh cilantro
ingredients.notes: Optional, but adds a pop of color

instructions: In a large skillet or wok, heat the coconut oil over medium-high heat.
Add the grated ginger and stir-fry for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the sliced rhubarb and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes, until slightly tender.
In a small bowl, mix together the brown sugar, salt, and lime juice until well combined.
Pour the sugar mixture over the rhubarb and stir-fry for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the rhubarb is coated and slightly caramelized.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Transfer the stir-fry to a serving dish and garnish with chopped cilantro, if desired.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
